Who I Am
About Me
Nare Sreehari
Data Analyst · ECE Student

I'm Nare Sreehari, a passionate data enthusiast turning raw data into meaningful stories.

Currently pursuing B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering at Narayana Engineering College, Gudur (2023-2027). I specialize in Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI — building dashboards and deriving insights that drive real decisions.

Beyond data analytics, I create content, edit videos, and enjoy solving coding challenges. I hold certifications from Google and Deloitte Australia, and have solved 70+ problems on Code Tantra.
